headline: Pfizer’s China Biotech Push Adds New Angle To PFE Valuation Story
summary: Pfizer is seeking drug development partnerships with Chinese biotech companies as local players gain ground on Western peers. The company aims to broaden its research and development model beyond the U.S. and Europe through these China focused collaborations. This shift reflects both competitive pressure from China’s rapid biotech progress and the potential opportunity to expand Pfizer’s future drug pipeline. For investors watching NYSE:PFE at a share price of $26.92, this push into China...

headline: Will Pricing Pressures on Core Drugs and COVID Uncertainty Change Pfizer's (PFE) Pipeline Recovery Narrative?
summary: In recent days, analysts have repeatedly flagged ongoing competitive and pricing pressures on Pfizer’s key products, including Paxlovid, Vyndamax and Prevnar, along with softer visibility for its COVID-19 vaccine franchise and pipeline execution risks. At the same time, Pfizer has been reshaping its portfolio through acquisitions, pipeline expansion and cost-saving efforts, creating a tension between product headwinds, dividend questions and its longer-term innovation ambitions. We’ll now...

headline: Big Pharma Is Turning to China for the Newest Drug Ideas
summary: China’s biotechs are faster and have lower costs, and its drug research threatens to soon overtake the West’s
